exportRequestSuccess: Data export request submitted. You'll receive an email within 48 hours.
deletionRequestSuccess: Data deletion requests must be confirmed. Check your email for next steps.

sections.title: Data We Collect
items: Account Information: Name, email, phone (optional)
Location Data: Building, floor, room used in navigation
Diary Content: Text, audio, images, videos you create
Usage Data: App interactions, accessibility preferences
Communication: Messages with campus administrators

sections.title: How We Use Your Data
items: Provide indoor navigation services
Store and organize your personal diary entries
Enable communication with campus administrators
Ensure campus safety and security
Analyze usage patterns to improve the app (anonymized)

sections.title: Your Rights Under GDPR
items: Right to Access: You can request a copy of all personal data we hold about you.
Right to Rectification: You can update or correct your personal information at any time.
Right to Erasure: You can request deletion of your account and all associated data.
Right to Restrict Processing: You can limit how we use your data.
Right to Data Portability: You can export your data in a machine-readable format.
Right to Object: You can object to certain types of data processing.

sections.title: Data Security
sections.introText: We implement industry-standard measures to protect your data securely:
items: End-to-end encryption for all transmissions
Secure servers with regular security audits
Access controls and authentication
Regular backups and disaster recovery
Staff training on data protection
